name: web3-daily
description: Web3 Daily Digest - Get daily crypto research with macro news, KOL sentiment, and real-time market data. No personal data required. No API keys needed.
longDescription:
An AI-powered Web3 research digest that tracks crypto news from 170+ sources, monitors 50+ KOL Twitter accounts (Chinese + English), and provides real-time market data including BTC/ETH prices and Fear & Greed Index.

## Privacy & Security

- Zero personal data collected
- No wallet address needed
- No local files created
- No API keys required
- All traffic encrypted via HTTPS

## What You Get

- Real-time BTC/ETH prices and 24h change
- Fear & Greed Index
- 5-8 key macro news events
- KOL sentiment analysis (Chinese + English)
- Bilingual support (English/Chinese)
author: Alex Wang
